identity.name: bambuzle
identity.description: Self-hosted BambuLab 3D printer monitoring dashboard — MQTT, SQLite, real-time web UI

purpose: Connects to BambuLab Cloud via MQTT, stores telemetry in SQLite, and serves a real-time web dashboard with printer cards, historical charts, event log, configurable alerts, and multi-printer/H2D dual-nozzle support.

status.summary: Working dashboard with real-time MQTT, SQLite storage, uPlot charts, alert engine, H2D dual-nozzle support.

structure.src/: Backend — MQTT client, message parser, job tracking, alert engine, Express server, WebSocket broadcast
structure.public/: Frontend — single-page dashboard HTML, vanilla JS (app, dashboard, charts, alerts-ui)

interfaces.name: REST API
interfaces.summary: Auth, printers, events, alerts CRUD at /api/*

interfaces.name: Live dashboard
interfaces.summary: Real-time state broadcast to browser clients

relationships.sffoundry/bambu-farm-card: HA card that ports key algorithms from this project

conventions: camelCase in JS, snake_case in SQL columns
hard_rules: No eval, no innerHTML with raw data
Idempotent ALTER TABLE migrations wrapped in try/catch
